title: Dylon Colour: Colour Caps (18 Wash Loads), Dylon Colour Caps for all Coloured Clothes, Colour Laundry Detergent Pods to Protect Colours, renewing in every wash with optimal results in 10 washes
features: Cares for Colours: Dylon Colour Caps Laundry Detergent not only cleans gently, but it also renews colours and fibres
Renews Fibres: Dylon transforms your faded and worn-out coloured clothes into looking and feeling like new

Triple Renew Formula: With a Triple Renew Technology, the clothes detergent provides Colour Renewal, reviving dull colours, Fibre Renewal, removing pills and fuzz, and Freshness Renewal, cleaning gently
Care For The Planet: Dylon Caps are made of 93% biodegradable ingredients; the laundry caps are 100% water soluble
Easy to Use: Just open the container of the detergent for coloured clothes and place one cap in the washing drum; then add laundry and start the washing cycle
description: Product Description New? No, washed with Dylon Colour Caps. Discover the convenient laundry caps format with its innovative formula - the optimum care for colourful clothes. This washing machine detergent provides not only gentle cleanliness for your colourful clothes but also care for your colours and fibres: it removes fuzzing and pilling resulting in a smooth and flawless surface and it makes your colours vibrant - so your clothes feel and look like new. All this is combined with a great fragrance, for fresh and clean results. The detergent can be used in temperatures even colder than 40 down to 20C and is suitable for sensitive skin. Dylon clothing detergent is safe for use on a variety of fabrics, even delicate fabrics. Dylon Colour Caps cleans gently + renews colours & fibres. For all colourful clothes. Choose Dylon, the colour detergent that goes beyond ordinary cleaning, and give your colourful clothes the care they deserve. Our innovative 3-chamber formula renews the colour and smoothes rough fibres so that your clothes look and feel like new. Care for your clothes and for the planet: The clothing washing liquid caps formula consists of 93% biodegradable ingredients and 100% water-soluble film. Dylon Colour Caps - for radiant, coloured clothes that look and feel like new. Our plant operates with 100% renewable electrcity and has zero production waste to landfill. Warning: Causes serious eye irritation. Keep out of reach of children. [Add the AISE icon.]. Ingredients 5-15% anionic surfactants, <5% soap, non-ionic surfactants, phosphonates. Further ingredients: Perfumes (Citronellol, Hexyl cinnamal), preservation agents (Benzisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone), Enzymes. Manufacturer Contact Information UK: Henkel Ltd., Wood Lane End, Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, HP2 4RQ, United Kingdom, IRL: Henkel Ireland Distribution Ltd., Tallaght Business Park, Whitestown, Dublin 24, D24 YH42, Ireland. See more
